allow_instructions: Allow read-only git: status, diff, log, branch -a, show, fetch (no push), rev-parse, merge-base.
Allow local git write only when the user explicitly asked to commit: git add, git commit (no push).
Allow build and test in this repo: ./mvnw compile or test, npm run dev/build, tsc -b.
Allow docker compose commands for local development under docker/.
block_instructions: Block all git push, git push -u, and any command that publishes commits to a remote (origin, upstream) unless the user's current message explicitly says to push (e.g. push, đẩy lên, push lên remote).
Block git push --force and force push to main, master, or any branch.
Block git merge or checkout that updates remote tracking branches without an explicit user request to push afterward.
Block changing global or local git config (git config).
Block rm -rf, sudo, or destructive commands outside the project workspace.
